title: Natural Wooden Insect Bee House | Hanging or Free Standing | Bug Hotel Shelter Nest for Insects Bees Butterflies Ladybugs | Home & Garden Décor (13x 8 x 26 cm)
features: HANGING INSECT HOME: Attract various insects in your garden and help them find shelter in this bug house. Made to accommodate bees, ladybugs, butterflies, beetles and other creepy crawlies, this garden accessory acts as a safe space to help preserve small bugs and encourage pollination of trees and flowers in your garden.

ECO FRIENDLY ACCESSORY: While posing as a beautiful decor piece in your garden and outdoor spaces, this insect nest box is completely environment friendly. It is made with natural components such as wood and wood shavings to ensure an eco-friendly and long lasting design, also helping the environment by letting bugs find a secure sanctuary to procreate.

VERSATILE DESIGN: This bee room nest is designed with various different compartments with a range of diverse elements, suited to the different living habits of numerous bugs and insects. It hosts narrow tubular tunnels, hollow compartments, closed rooms with slits or circular punches, a netted nesting area and other elements.

EASY INSTALLATION: This outdoor safe box for insects is easy to hang anywhere you wish, without the hassle of complicated tools. It comes pre-assembled with a built-in loop at the back that can be hung on exterior walls, trees and other hooks in the garden. The butterfly house can also be left free standing on stable surfaces.
PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS: This Wooden Insect Bee House measures 13x 8 x 26 cm and is available in pastel colours. It features a sloped, over-hanging roof to provide protection against weather.
